ddls:
CREATE TABLE "climate_metrics" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data entry */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the data entry */,
  "mei" REAL /* Multivariate ENSO Index (MEI) value */,
  "co2" REAL /* Concentration of Carbon Dioxide (CO2) in ppm */,
  "ch4" REAL /* Concentration of Methane (CH4) in ppb */,
  "n2o" REAL /* Concentration of Nitrous Oxide (N2O) in ppb */,
  "cfc_11" REAL /* Concentration of CFC-11 in ppt */,
  "cfc_12" REAL /* Concentration of CFC-12 in ppt */,
  "tsi" REAL /* Total Solar Irradiance (TSI) in W/m² */,
  "aerosols" REAL /* Aerosol optical depth value */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature anomaly in °C */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Exact date of the measurement */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the measurement location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the measurement location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the measurement location */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Indicates the quality of the data */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year", "month", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., satellite, ground station) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data collected (e.g., greenhouse gas measurements, temperature records) */,
  "description" TEXT /* A textual description of the data source */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for inquiries about the data source */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., satellite, ground station, model) */,
  "source_location" TEXT /* Location of the data source */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used for data collection */,
  "data_collection_instrument" TEXT /* Instrument used for data collection */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection (e.g., daily, monthly) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided by the source */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the data source was updated */,
  "data_quality_assurance" TEXT /* Quality assurance measures in place for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., Mauna Loa Observatory) */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the location is situated */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* A textual description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed and salted) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data analyst, scientist, admin) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Concentration of Carbon Dioxide (CO2) in ppm
